title: Hornet Removal in Inwood, Long Island, NYC | $350 – $550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Inwood, Long Island. Safe, fast hornet nest elimination for $350 – $550. Licensed experts serving Inwood homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets in Inwood can be dangerous for your family and neighbors. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Inwood, Long Island, safely eliminating nests from residential properties, commercial buildings, and outdoor spaces. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to protect your property and ensure hornets don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Inwood and the surrounding Long Island communities for years with certified, insured technicians who understand local hornet species and nesting behaviors. We offer same-day emergency services, transparent pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee on all hornet removal work.
localContext: Inwood's mix of suburban homes, wooded areas, and proximity to parks creates ideal conditions for hornet nests in eaves, trees, and outdoor structures. Whether you're near the Inwood Country Club or in one of the neighborhood's residential streets, our team knows the unique pest challenges facing Long Island properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Inwood?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services in Inwood. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on the nest size and location. We prioritize urgent cases where hornets pose an immediate threat to residents or are located near high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe nest removal or treatment, elimination of all hornets, preventative measures to discourage future nesting, and a follow-up visit if needed. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for safe removal.

faqs.question: Are hornet removals safe for my family and pets in Inwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, safety is our top priority. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade protective equipment to safely remove hornets without endangering your family, pets, or neighbors. We'll advise you on any temporary precautions needed during treatment and ensure the area is completely safe before completing the service.

faqs.question: What types of hornets are common in Inwood, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Inwood commonly sees bald-faced hornets and European hornets, both of which build large nests in trees, under eaves, and in attics. These species are particularly aggressive when defending their nests and can sting multiple times. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all hornet species found in the Long Island area.
